scripts.check: node --check script.js && node --check submit-indexnow.mjs && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const s=fs.readFileSync('sitemap.xml','utf8'); if ((s.match(/<loc>/g)||[]).length !== 2) throw new Error('expected 2 sitemap URLs'); JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8').match(/<script type=\"application\/ld\+json\">([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/)[1]);"
